title: Telegram: channel-awareness (concise conversational replies)
current_state: Pi does not know it is speaking through Telegram and sometimes returns markdown headers or over-formatted replies.
target_state: A channel note appended to dispatched_text instructs Pi to keep replies concise and conversational with no markdown headers when answering via Telegram.
solution: Added [CHANNEL: Telegram — keep reply concise and conversational, no markdown headers] note to _dispatch_bubble dispatched_text.
